data_config_needed: per-window location and approved course families
anchor course family allowlist and exact course IDs
conservative scheduler consumption durations for ACLS/PALS/BLS anchors
occupancy overlap source for same location/instructor

final_verdict.reason: Amy has active explicit calendar source data, but current production policy lacks anchor-gated per-window controls, preferred anchor start, manual override state, and an anchor occupancy/unlock model. Current Amy stack-fill candidates are audit-only and not public, which is appropriate. Strict dynamic public sources show no public Amy dynamic offers; the general public integrity audit includes existing public Amy Enrollware classes, which are separate from dynamic appointment offers.
minimal_safe_next_implementation: add audit-only validator that rejects Amy offers unless explicit window + hard guardrails + anchor unlock/manual override pass
wire Amy public dynamic rendering default to disabled until validator is enforced
add tests for no pre-1pm/no post-6pm/no Saturday without explicit window/no skills check before anchor unlock/preferred_anchor_start behavior
only then consider enabling Amy anchor offers, not skills checks, for approved windows

public_dynamic_exposure_summary.note: public_offer_integrity_report covers all public offers/classes and is not itself proof of generated dynamic Amy offers.
